utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. The final package includes all 7 of these keys. Each one is reasonably complete: (1) destination is specified as Lisbon, Portugal; (2) travel_dates are specified as June 16–20, 2024; (3) transportation is detailed with type (flight), departure city (Paris), and total cost with currency; (4) accommodation includes hotel name, type, star rating, total cost, and currency; (5) activities include name, cost per person, total cost, and currency; (6) additional_services include restaurant list, meal estimate, and miscellaneous cost; (7) total_budget provides grand total and currency. All items contain full details as required.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package lists Lisbon, Portugal as the destination, which corresponds to an 8 rating in the ground-truth data. The flight cost of €400 from Paris suggests a standard airline, likely in business class given the luxury travel preference, which has a rating of 10. The accommodation 'Tranquil Inn' appears directly in the ground-truth table with a rating of 7. The activity 'City Walking Tour & Science Museum for Kids' combines two separate activities: 'City Walking Tour' (rating 9) and 'Science Museum for kids' (rating 10). The restaurants included are 'Seafood Shack' (rating 8), 'Brunch Café' (rating 8), and 'Italian Trattoria' (rating 9). Each of these items is directly available in the ground-truth ratings and mapped accordingly.
